reasoning: The question requires Nicaragua to experience >16.67 fatalities in the 30 days prior to March 22, 2026. As of March 15 (23 days into the 30-day window), multiple targeted searches in both English and Spanish yield no reports of mass casualty events, protests, or spikes in violence in Nicaragua. Since such an event would generate significant news coverage (as seen in the 2018 protests or recent indigenous clashes), the absence of reporting strongly suggests the threshold has not been met. It is extremely unlikely that 17+ fatalities occurred quietly or will occur in the remaining 7 days to trigger a 'YES' resolution.
